description: The dashboard provides insights of Azure Apps via different metrics for app monitoring through Application Insights.

options.content:

App map

Failures

${res}
Browsers

azureLogAnalytics.query:
exceptions
| where timestamp >= $__timeFrom and timestamp < $__timeTo
| extend Opid = operation_Id
| extend ExceptionMessage = coalesce(outerMessage, innermostMessage, type)
| extend Stack = coalesce(tostring(details[0].parsedStack), tostring(details), tostring(customDimensions["StackTrace"]))
| project timestamp, Opid, ExceptionMessage, Stack
| order by timestamp desc
| take 500

links.title: ${res} | Average processor and process CPU utilization

panels.title: Average processor and process CPU utilization
